titleStmt.title: SII 31.66: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 66. (A.R. No. B 334 of 1936.) POṬLADURTI, PRODDATTUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Chennakēśavasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1435, Śrīmukha, Śrāvaṇa ba. 13, Thursday corresponding to July 30, Saturday (not Thursday) 1513 A.D.

Registers a gift of tolls (sthaḷa suṅkuṁ) collected from the village Poṭtadurtti for conducting the festival like Uṭti kōlvu mid-day offerings (rē-madhyapūta avasaram) and also for kari avudupāḷu (raw or boiled vegetables) on the day of Śrī Jayanti to the god Chennakēśava situated at Poṭṭadurti by Rāchirāju son of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara [Yaṟaguḍi] Gaḍḍamayya. The donees father is said to have been obtained Poṭladurti as nāyaṁkara from the king Śrī Kṛishṇadēvarāya. The inscription further refers to the one kha of and two kha of maḍi of land by certain Chinmallaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu .
svasti . jayābhyu
daya śālivāha
na śakava¨rṣaṁbbu
lu 1435 Agu
nēṭī śrīmukha saṁva
tsara śrāvaṇa ba 13
gu śrīvatsalāṁcca
sa catu¨rbhuva va nā
dhīśvaruḍaina poṭla
do¨rti ceṁnakēśvaru
niki śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara yaṟaguḍu
gaḍḍanuyyadēva mahā
rāja komāruṁḍu
rācirāju gāru śrīrā
jādhi rājaparamēśva
ra vīrapratāpa śrī kriṣṇa
dēvamahārāyalu vija
ya nagaramaṁḍu pṛdhivī rā
jyaṁ śēyucuṁḍi māknu juReadmākunu
ṭla koḻvaku yicni poṭlaReadyicina
duriti nāyakkaraṁ lōnu
poṭladorutanu catu¨rbhu
vanādhīśvaruḍaina ceṁnakēśva
radēvuniki rēmathyapūṭa
Avasaraṁ sāgiṁci
Aṁdku Avudu paḷakunu
kariAvudulakuṁ gānu
śrījayaṁtti puṇyakā
lamaṁdu

śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvarayaṟaguḍi ga
ḍamayadēvamahārā
jala komāruḍu rāca
rāju sahiraṁṇyōda
ka dāna dhārapū¨rvakaṁ gā
nu poṭladuriti staḷasuṁ
kaṁ dhāraŌsi Istimi

[Anubhaviṁ] cēdi svada
ttāṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānu pālanaṁ
paradattāpaharēṇa sva
dattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
yīdha¨rmānakuyavva
ru dappinānu gōvuṁ
nnubrāhmaniṁnni tamata
llitaṁḍrulānu vāraṇā
silō vadhiṁcina pāpāna
pōduru . I [Ī]dha¨rmānaku
yavaru virōdhiṁccinā
nu virōdhiṁcina vāni
mānyaṁ guṁṭalu gōvu
laku Icinavāḍu
poṭladuri tepra
jalaku

cennakēśava pe
rumāḷaku pa
dmanāyaṁku
manmaḍaṁcina
malnēni komā
ḍlu cinama
layana tā
tayya sāṣṭā .
ga daṁḍaṁ sama
¨rpiṁciri .
kha 1 nnuma
ḍi khaṁ . nu

nu puṟaḍu
cēnu maḍi
paṁdumu
nu peṭībhōgaṁ
sōmanagāriki
dēvuni bhōgānaku
sāgiṁcci dhārā pū
¨rva kaṁgānu dhārabō
si yistimi gāna Ā
caṁdā¨rka stāIgā
nu dēvuniki vaibhavaṁ sē
suka bradikēdi I(Ī) dha¨rmānaku
yavaru dapinānu gōvuṁ
nnu brāhmaninnu vadhiṁccina pā
pāna pōvuvāru Āta
pinanāni mānyaṁ
da lagōvulaku
Icinavāru
